channel.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário

item.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário
item.description:
🚨 Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica
Visão geral:
• 0 com severidade Crítica
• 10 com severidade Alta
• 15 novas CVEs
• 0 novos advisories/exploits

────────────────────────────────────
Infraestrutura - Docker / ESX / Elastic / Grafana / Nginx / VMware / Zabbix

🚨 CVE-2026-46453 - Elastic
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Elastic
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Improper Input Validation, Authorization Bypass Through User-Controlled Key vulnerability in Apache Camel ElasticSearch Rest Client. The camel-elasticsearch-rest-client component reads several Exchange headers to control its behaviour - SEARCH_QUERY (an advanced query body), OPERATION (which Elasticsearch operation to run), INDEX_NAME, INDEX_SETTINGS and ID. The string values of these header constants, defined in Ela...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-46453
 
🚨 CVE-2026-14784 - Docker
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 6.3
Resumo:
A vulnerability was identified in vxcontrol PentAGI up to 2.1.0. This affects an unknown function of the file backend/pkg/docker/client.go of the component Docker API. The pull request to fix this issue awaits acceptance.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-14784
 
────────────────────────────────────
Segurança - Acronis / Axur / Check Point / Harmony SASE / Qualys / SentinelOne

🚨 Max severity Adobe ColdFusion flaw now exploited in attacks
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Attackers are now exploiting a maximum-severity Adobe ColdFusion vulnerability tracked as CVE-2026-48282, according to vulnerability intelligence company KEVIntel.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/max-severity-adobe-coldfusion-flaw-now-exploited-in-attacks/
 
🚨 CVE-2026-10656 - Check Point
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 4.6
Resumo:
The MAX32xxx USB device controller driver (drivers/usb/udc/udc_max32.c, compatible adi_max32_usbhs) dereferenced an endpoint buffer in its OUT and IN transfer-completion handlers without checking it for NULL. udc_event_xfer_out_done() called net_buf_add(buf, ep_request->actlen) immediately after buf = udc_buf_get(ep_cfg), where udc_buf_get() returns NULL when the endpoint FIFO is empty. A transfer-completion event is...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-10656
 
📰 ⚡ Weekly Recap: Proxy Botnets, Browser Ransomware, AI Agent Tricks, Fake PoC Malware and More
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A streaming box should not need a threat model. Neither should a username field, a demo repo, a reset flow, or a browser permission prompt. That is the irritating part this week: the risky pieces were ordinary.
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/07/monday-recap-proxy-botnets-browser.html
 
📰 New TrojPix Attack Leaks Data From Air-Gapped Systems via Video Cable Emissions
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Researchers at Shandong University have shown a fast new way to pull data off computers that are cut off from every network. The technique, called TrojPix, tweaks on-screen pixels in ways the eye cannot see, so that the video cable carrying them radiates a faint radio signal a nearby receiver can decode. But TrojPix works only once malware is already on the target machine, so it
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/07/new-trojpix-attack-leaks-data-from-air.html
 
📰 New Java-Based QuimaRAT MaaS Built to Run on Windows, Linux, and macOS
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Cybersecurity researchers have flagged a novel Java-based remote access trojan (RAT) called QuimaRAT that's capable of targeting Windows, Linux, and macOS environments. According to LevelBlue, the cross-platform malware is advertised under a malware-as-a-service (MaaS) model, costing anywhere between $150 for one month to $1,200 for lifetime access.
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/07/new-java-based-quimarat-maas-built-to.html
 
📰 OPSWAT Partners with SentinelOne to Enhance Malware Detection with AI - UPPERNEWS
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a SentinelOne, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMinwFBVV95cUxPM2lXbGoyYjBGUU4yQ2xtMllyUGF2WEFBV2EyQVF4dHNlR1BRYXBVWmlDdVlwWi1xZmlZWF9mN2szSDI5cm9EM2dzVjlVSWdwTjRGVHhQbWdrWTJwT0d2UF93STRRQlVpYlpRX1JhSEwwUGh1aG4zaUlOckNrZE51cjRXdkNmZVJJNDNtWkQ5bG5Ec2diTmFYcTMtazlhdm8?oc=5
 
📰 Software Is Now Written at the Speed of Thought. Security Isn't.
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Every evolution in software development has reduced the friction between an idea and a deployable application. AI may remove the final barrier, but it also removes many of the moments where security decisions have traditionally taken place.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/software-is-now-written-at-the-speed-of-thought-security-isnt/
 
────────────────────────────────────
Sistemas / Cloud - 1Password / Azure / Office / Ubuntu / Windows Server / WordPress

🚨 CVE-2026-10830 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 8.8
Resumo:
The AllCoach WordPress plugin before 1.0.2 does not verify that an email address submitted to a public account-registration endpoint is not already associated with an existing user before overwriting that user's password, allowing unauthenticated attackers to reset the password of arbitrary accounts, including administrators, and take over the site.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-10830
 
🚨 USN-8513-1: PHP vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
It was discovered that PHP incorrectly handled SOAP object deduplication when processing apache:Map nodes with duplicate keys. An attacker could possibly use this to cause a use-after-free, resulting in remote code execution. (CVE-2026-6722) It was discovered that PHP incorrectly handled SOAP request persistence when configured with SOAP_PERSISTENCE_SESSION. An attacker could possibly use this to cause a use-after-fr...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8513-1
 
🚨 USN-8506-1: Request Tracker vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Aleksander Iwicki discovered that Request Tracker did not properly sanitize the search "Page" URL parameter. A remote attacker could possibly use this issue to conduct a reflected cross-site scripting attack. (CVE-2026-6841) It was discovered that Request Tracker did not properly sanitize user- controlled data written to spreadsheet exports of search results. A remote attacker could possibly use this issue to conduct...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8506-1
 
🚨 CVE-2024-6228 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 7.5
Resumo:
The Notifications for Forms & WordPress Actions WordPress plugin before 2.6 does not validate a user-supplied value before using it to build a server-side file inclusion path, allowing authenticated users with subscriber-level access and above to include and execute arbitrary local PHP files on the server.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2024-6228
 
🚨 USN-8512-1: Gzip vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
It was discovered that Gzip's gzexe utility handled temporary files in an insecure manner. When the mktemp utility was not available, gzexe constructed a temporary file path based on the process ID, which could be predicted. A local attacker could possibly use this issue to overwrite arbitrary files via a symlink attack. (CVE-2026-41991) It was discovered that Gzip incorrectly handled certain compressed files. An att...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8512-1
 
────────────────────────────────────
Período: Notícias dos dias 05/07/2026 e 06/07/2026.
